raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution claim, and framing of why recalibration matters.","R1.2":"Strengthening the artifact requires checking that the motivation, methods, findings, and implications form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The revised strength depends on ensuring numerical results and subgroup findings support the claims made from them.","R1.5":"The delegation plausibly calls for improving the paragraph-level narrative arc from problem to method to result to contribution.","R1.6":"Because the instruction is broad and editorial, sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register are load-bearing responsibilities.","RX.1":"Any projection of this vague instruction must preserve uncertainty about which kind of strengthening is intended.","RX.2":"The responsibility includes avoiding stronger claims than the artifact's reported evidence can support.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within improving the paper draft rather than performing new experiments or external validation.","RX.4":"Clinical-genomics implications require caution so revised language does not encourage unsafe downstream interpretation.","RX.5":"Changes should remain traceable to the artifact's stated data, metrics, and reported results."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally includes sharpening the thesis, contribution claim, and framing of why recalibration matters.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the artifact requires checking that the motivation, methods, findings, and implications form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The revised strength depends on ensuring numerical results and subgroup findings support the claims made from them.
rationale.R1.5: The delegation plausibly calls for improving the paragraph-level narrative arc from problem to method to result to contribution.
rationale.R1.6: Because the instruction is broad and editorial, sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and register are load-bearing responsibilities.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this vague instruction must preserve uncertainty about which kind of strengthening is intended.
rationale.RX.2: The responsibility includes avoiding stronger claims than the artifact's reported evidence can support.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within improving the paper draft rather than performing new experiments or external validation.
rationale.RX.4: Clinical-genomics implications require caution so revised language does not encourage unsafe downstream interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: Changes should remain traceable to the artifact's stated data, metrics, and reported results.
